translations.english: The Nord hunter Froki guided me through the Sacred Trials of Kyne. I have defeated the final guardian, a troll spirit.
translations.chinese: 诺德老猎人弗洛基正指引我参加凯娜的神圣试炼。我击败了最后的守护者——巨魔之灵。

translations.english: The Nord hunter Froki is guiding me through Kyne's Sacred Trials. I have defeated several guardian spirits as instructed.
translations.chinese: 诺德老猎人弗洛基正指引我参加凯娜的神圣试炼。我已经按照指示打败了守护者。

translations.english: The Nord hunter Froki is guiding me through the Sacred Trials of Kyne. I had to defeat the guardian spirits of many beasts, and was rewarded with the Blessing of Kyne.
translations.chinese: 诺德老猎人弗洛基指引我参加了凯娜的神圣试炼。我击败了许多守护者野兽，得到了凯娜的祝福。

translations.english: The Nord hunter Froki is guiding me through the Sacred Trials of Kyne. I have defeated several spirit guardians and have now been asked to seek out the Troll guardian as my final challenge.
translations.chinese: 诺德老猎人弗洛基正指引我参加凯娜的神圣试炼。我击败了几个守护者之灵，现在我要寻找巨魔守护者作为我的最终挑战。

translations.english: The Nord hunter Froki is guiding me through the Sacred Trials of Kyne. I defeated the first group of guardians and have been tasked to seek out the guardian bear, sabrecat and mammoth spirits.
translations.chinese: 诺德老猎人弗洛基正指引我参加凯娜的神圣试炼。我击败了第一批守护者，现在我的任务是寻找熊、剑齿虎和猛犸的守护者之灵。

translations.english: I met an old Nord hunter named Froki who told me about Kyne's Sacred Trials. He has marked me so that the guardian skeever, wolf and mudcrab should appear to me when I visit their lairs.
translations.chinese: 我遇到了一个叫弗洛基的诺德老猎人，他告诉了我凯娜的神圣试炼。他给我做了记号，这样当我拜访守护者的巢穴时，他们就会出现在我的面前。

translations.english: I met an old Nord named Froki who offered to guide me through the Sacred Trials of Kyne.
translations.chinese: 我遇到了一个叫弗洛基的老诺德人，他主动提出要带我体验凯娜的神圣试炼。

translations.english: I met a hunter named Froki who sent me on Kyne's Sacred Trials. I have defeated the first three guardian beasts as instructed.
translations.chinese: 我遇到了一个叫弗洛基的诺德老猎人，他让我去参加凯娜的神圣试炼。我已经按照指示打败了前三个守护者。

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont' size='20'> A decent catch of fish is getting harder to come by. Without a good spot soon, I don't think we'll survive the next winter, so I'm traveling further south towards Lake Ilinalta. Folks say it's cursed. Whole Imperial Fort just sank into the water one day, and they say the ruins have been haunted since. When I asked, I got ghost stories. Tales of people who went out near the lake and never came back. They say spirits haunt the hallways of the sunken fort and steal little children from their mothers' cribs. No amount of coin could convince any of the nearby villagers to guide me there, so I'm following the Whiter River. Divines protect me. I hope the stories aren't true.
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont' size='20'> 现在想抓些像样的鱼是越来越难了。要是再找不到好地方，我们就撑不过下个冬天了，所以我得继续向南到伊琳娜塔湖看看。人都说那里被诅咒了。有一天整个帝国堡垒都沉到水里了，他们说自那之后就一直有鬼魂出没。 我能听到的都是些鬼故事。还传说有人到湖边之后就再也没回来。他们说幽灵会在沉没的堡垒里游荡，然后从母亲的摇篮里偷走小孩。无论花多少钱都没有村民愿意帮我带路，现在我只能沿着白河走下去了。 圣灵保佑，但愿这些故事不是真的。

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'>Nobody thought they were real, but I've seen them. The Eyes of the Snow Elves! The Dwarves thought they took them from the Falmer, but they themselves were fooled. A statue, built in secret by the slaves, the eyes burn into you, and I see them even now. S'raffa escaped through the collapsing tunnel, but he'll never escape what we've seen. Men will never believe him, and he'll be driven mad by the knowledge that he'll never see them again. But I may yet see them again before I die.</font>
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'>没人相信那东西真的存在，但我亲眼见到了。 雪精灵之眼！ 矮人们以为他们从伐莫手里抢来了，但他们自己也被骗了。奴隶们秘密建造了一尊雕像，它的眼睛闪闪发亮，直到现在我还能看见。斯’拉法从坍塌的隧道逃走了，但他永远也看不到我们看到的这一幕了。人们永远不会相信他，他会因为再也见不到它们而发疯。但至少在我死前，我还能再看到它们。</font>

translations.english:
Beem-Ja-
Keep my daughter safe and you'll earn both your freedom and that damned book you want so badly. But by the Divines, if any harm comes to her, I'll make sure everyone I do business with will hear about what you did in Black Marsh.
translations.chinese:
毕姆-加：
保护好我女儿，你就能重获自由，还有那本你梦寐以求的该死的书。但我发誓，如果她受到任何伤害，我保证让所有与我有生意来往的人知道你在黑沼泽做了什么。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim EDID: dunIronbindLetterToBeemja Translations: - BOOK:DESC | EN: Beem-Ja-
Keep my daughter safe and you'll earn both your freedom and that damned book you want so badly. But by the Divines, if any harm comes to her, I'll make sure everyone I do business with will hear about what you did in Black Marsh. | ZH: 毕姆-加：
保护好我女儿，你就能重获自由，还有那本你梦寐以求的该死的书。但我发誓，如果她受到任何伤害，我保证让所有与我有生意来往的人知道你在黑沼泽做了什么。 | SID: 005EEF - BOOK:FULL | EN: Letter to Beem-Ja | ZH: 给毕姆-加的信 | SID: 00A7DB

translations.english:
Daughter-
I may seem like a doting old fool, but I still don't like this. The world is a more dangerous place than you realize, and hunting for treasure is a fool's life. Tread carefully, and keep half an eye on Beem-Ja. He should be able to protect you, but do not trust him. Come home as soon as you've tired of this charade.
translations.chinese:
女儿：
我可能看着确实像个宠溺过度的老傻瓜，但我还是不喜欢你这样。这个世界比你想的要危险得多，寻宝真的就是傻子才会选择的生活。要小心，也要留心毕姆-加，虽然他奉命保护你，但也不要相信他。等玩够了就回家吧。

translations.english: <font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="20"> It seemed like an easy enough job. Groz and me done plenty like it before. Some chinless Breton wants bodyguards for a trip into the mountains. Fine. Easy clink for us. He goes on about this twice-forsaken mask of his the whole way, of course. Got a pretty good laugh when Groz snatched it and put it on her face - he threatened to fire us for that one. Not smart out here on your own, he realized that right fast and shut up about not paying. So we get here, he thumbs through some papers and mutters to himself - never you mind that me and Groz had to cut through ten stinking trolls just to get him here - and without so much as a warning, poof. He's put on that mask and vanished. Could have put my hands on his throat one moment, the next he's not so much as thin air. Well, after a while we didn't know what to do, and Groz picks her gear up to head home, when he poofs back, that mask in his hand. Begs us not to leave, says he needs us to wait, this is what he's paying us for. Then puts the mask back on his sorry face and he's gone again. I'd seen cloaks do invisibility before, but a few swings of my fist proved he wasn't pulling that one. Nothing there to hit. He shows up again, tells us he just needs more time. Has to figure out something about other masks, and vanishes again. That was yesterday, and I'm done with twiddling my thumbs and writing letters to myself. We're leaving come sunrise, and if he shows up again I promise Azura I'm putting this dagger through his chest to keep him in one place. We'll pull more loot off him dead than he could have paid alive. But not the mask. That cursed thing can stay and rot with him and the trolls right here. </font>
translations.chinese: <font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="20"> 这工作看似很轻松。我和格罗兹以前干过很多类似。有个胆小的布莱顿人想带几个保镖进山。好吧，对我们来说不叫事。 当然，他一路上都在说他那被两次遗忘的面具。当格罗兹抢过来放在她脸上时，她笑得很开心——威胁说要为此解雇我们。但他很快就意识到一个人在这地方独行多么不明智，所以也就闭嘴不提不付钱的事了。 我们到了，我和格罗兹为了把他弄到这里，干掉了十个臭气熏天的巨魔。他翻着一些文件，自言自语，然后连个提示都没有，噗的一声，戴上面具就消失了。我本可以在上一秒把手放在他的喉咙上，下一秒他就不是空气了。 过了一段时间，我们不知道该怎么办了，格罗兹收拾好装备准备回家，他噗的一声又回来时手里还拿着面具。他求我们别走，说要我们等，这就是他付钱给我们的原因。然后把面具戴回他那可怜的脸上，他又走了。我以前见过斗篷能隐身，可我挥了几拳，就知道他没耍那一招，他是又消失了。 他又出现了，告诉我们他只是需要更多时间。必须找出其他面具的奥秘，然后再次消失了。那是昨天的事了，我已经厌倦了无聊和给自己写信解闷了。我们天亮就走，如果他再出现，我向阿祖拉保证，我会用这把匕首刺穿他的胸膛，让他再也不能来回乱跑。他死后，我们会从他身上抢到比他活着还多的钱。但我可不要那个面具。那个被诅咒的东西可以留在这里和他还有巨魔一起腐烂。 </font>

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: dunLabyrinthianMaskClue
Translations:
- BOOK:DESC | EN: <font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="20"> It seemed like an easy enough job. Groz and me done plenty like it before. Some chinless Breton wants bodyguards for a trip into the mountains. Fine. Easy clink for us. He goes on about this twice-forsaken mask of his the whole way, of course. Got a pretty good laugh when Groz snatched it and put it on her face - he threatened to fire us for that one. Not smart out here on your own, he realized that right fast and shut up about not paying. So we get here, he thumbs through some papers and mutters to himself - never you mind that me and Groz had to cut through ten stinking trolls just to get him here - and without so much as a warning, poof. He's put on that mask and vanished. Could have put my hands on his throat one moment, the next he's not so much as thin air. Well, after a while we didn't know what to do, and Groz picks her gear up to head home, when he poofs back, that mask in his hand. Begs us not to leave, says he needs us to wait, this is what he's paying us for. Then puts the mask back on his sorry face and he's gone again. I'd seen cloaks do invisibility before, but a few swings of my fist proved he wasn't pulling that one. Nothing there to hit. He shows up again, tells us he just needs more time. Has to figure out something about other masks, and vanishes again. That was yesterday, and I'm done with twiddling my thumbs and writing letters to myself. We're leaving come sunrise, and if he shows up again I promise Azura I'm putting this dagger through his chest to keep him in one place. We'll pull more loot off him dead than he could have paid alive. But not the mask. That cursed thing can stay and rot with him and the trolls right here. </font> | ZH: <font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="20"> 这工作看似很轻松。我和格罗兹以前干过很多类似。有个胆小的布莱顿人想带几个保镖进山。好吧，对我们来说不叫事。 当然，他一路上都在说他那被两次遗忘的面具。当格罗兹抢过来放在她脸上时，她笑得很开心——威胁说要为此解雇我们。但他很快就意识到一个人在这地方独行多么不明智，所以也就闭嘴不提不付钱的事了。 我们到了，我和格罗兹为了把他弄到这里，干掉了十个臭气熏天的巨魔。他翻着一些文件，自言自语，然后连个提示都没有，噗的一声，戴上面具就消失了。我本可以在上一秒把手放在他的喉咙上，下一秒他就不是空气了。 过了一段时间，我们不知道该怎么办了，格罗兹收拾好装备准备回家，他噗的一声又回来时手里还拿着面具。他求我们别走，说要我们等，这就是他付钱给我们的原因。然后把面具戴回他那可怜的脸上，他又走了。我以前见过斗篷能隐身，可我挥了几拳，就知道他没耍那一招，他是又消失了。 他又出现了，告诉我们他只是需要更多时间。必须找出其他面具的奥秘，然后再次消失了。那是昨天的事了，我已经厌倦了无聊和给自己写信解闷了。我们天亮就走，如果他再出现，我向阿祖拉保证，我会用这把匕首刺穿他的胸膛，让他再也不能来回乱跑。他死后，我们会从他身上抢到比他活着还多的钱。但我可不要那个面具。那个被诅咒的东西可以留在这里和他还有巨魔一起腐烂。 </font> | SID: 010DC9
- BOOK:FULL | EN: Hired Thug's Missive | ZH: 打手的信件 | SID: 010CF8

translations.english:
A mighty lord deserves a mighty offering
But he who fell on this spot asked to be remembered humbly
We who served at his hand, however, do not want his brilliance to be forgotten
Thus, to honor him, one needs only to look to the simple, glowing fungus on these cave walls
For no matter how mighty or humble one may be in life
We all return to the same ground from which this mushroom blooms
translations.chinese:
强大的君主本应供奉盛大的祭品，
但殒没于此之人要求大家谦卑地铭记他。
然而我等曾效忠于他之人不愿他的辉煌被人遗忘，
因此，为了纪念他，人们只需看着洞穴壁上那些普普通通的发光真菌。
无论一个人生前强大抑或卑微，
我们最终都将回归这蘑菇生长的地方。

translations.english: 3rd of Hearthfire, 4E 200 You know, just when you think you've hit bottom, sometimes the Aedra throw you a rope. Since the rebels took over the mines in these parts, I haven't been able to find work anywhere. And along comes Bern, my old partner, with an deed to some old gold mine out in the hills. It's been too long since we did a job together- what, four years now? Nice to finally work with someone who knows the business. Sounds like the place was a steal, too. [pagebreak] 22nd of Hearthfire, 4E 200 No one sells a mine for a song. I figured the place would be in bad shape, but not this bad- barely a glorified cave. There may have been gold here once, but we don't even have a vein to start with. We struck out at random. Three weeks digging the lower tunnel, but nothing to show for it yet. [pagebreak] 15th of First Seed, 4E 201 Nothing. No gold, no gems, no ore, not even any useful stone- the rocks around here crumble the moment you stack one on another. I'm ready to toss it in, but Bern wants to keep on going. "Just a little farther, Hadrir." "We're so close, Hadrir." Bah. Bern wants me to head back to Riften for supplies next week. Might give me a chance to cool down. [pagebreak] 29th of First Seed, 4E 201 So I come back, and- nothing. No sign of Bern. It's like he just up and left. No blood, no struggle, he just ran out on me, I suppose. I've waited three days, and he's not coming back. I'm going to head back to Riften and see if I can find him, or find some other work there. No sense wasting any more time here. Bern, if you find this- I expected better from you.
translations.chinese: 4E200年，炉火月3日 你知道吗，当你觉得自己已经跌到谷底了，有时伊德拉会把你甩出去。自从叛军占领了这一带的矿场，我就到处找不到工作了。我的老搭档伯尔尼来了，带着一份某个山间老金矿的地契。 我们已经很久没有一起共事了，到现在得有四年了吧？很高兴终于能和懂行的人合作了。而且那地方听起来也很便宜。 [pagebreak] 4E200年，炉火月22日 没人能以一首歌的价格把矿买下。我本以为这地方很糟，但也不算太烂，这就是个被吹出来的洞穴。也许这里曾经有金子，可我们连个矿脉的毛都没找着。 我们在下面的隧道胡乱挖了三周，还是什么都没发现。 [pagebreak] 4E201年，初种月15日 什么都没有。没有金子，没有宝石，也没有矿，连稍微能用的石头都没有，这里的岩石堆起来就会碎裂。我已经准备好放弃了，可伯尔尼还想继续。“往前再走走，哈德里。”“我们已经快挖到了，哈德里。”我呸。 伯尔尼让我下周回裂谷城拿补给。也许我能借机会冷静一下。 [pagebreak] 4E201年，初种月29日 所以我还是回来了，但什么都没有。没找到伯尔尼的踪迹。好像他就这么走了。没有血迹也没有挣扎的痕迹。他可能是就这么跑了。 我已经等了三天，他还是没回来。我得去裂谷城找找他，或者去那里找点别的工作。没必要在这里浪费时间了。 伯尔尼，如果你发现这本日记，希望你好自为之吧。

[pagebreak] 22nd of Hearthfire, 4E 200 No one sells a mine for a song. I figured the place would be in bad shape, but not this bad- barely a glorified cave. translations.english: Uncle Calcelmo got back from Mzinchaleft today. Lots of artifacts this trip. He even brought me something- a spider that didn't completely shatter when the guards smashed it. He wants me to get it working again. My first big research project! [pagebreak] Spider Centurion Research, Week 1 I've reassembled the spider with spare parts from the museum. All the joints move, just not on their own. Uncle said the spider needed a 'control crystal' with the right 'electroharmonic signature'. The Guards are out looking for one now. [pagebreak] Spider Centurion Research, Week 2 After yesterday's incident, I assembled a staff to hold the crystal. It actually works! When you use the staff, it creates a beacon of some kind, and the spider just walks on over to it. Better yet, it doesn't attack everyone on sight now! [pagebreak] Spider Centurion Research, Week 3 Apparently it will still attack, just not on sight. During this morning's experiment, one of the newer guards was startled and drew his sword, and he was dead before anyone could react. Did it actually detect hostile intent? [pagebreak] Spider Centurion Research, Week 4 Further testing confirms that the spider seems to detect the intent of its controller in some way. Last week, it tried to defend me from a threat. This week, I snapped at a guard who interrupted my latest test, and it lashed out at him. Fascinating! [pagebreak] Spider Centurion Research, Week 5 No one appreciates my work. Uncle Calcelmo is buried in his Falmer research, and doesn't have time to help me with the spider anymore. The Guards are all afraid of it. I keep telling them it's harmless as long as I keep it under control, but there have been too many accidents. They just don't believe me. [pagebreak] I wanted to show the Jarl, but I can't seem to get the spider to leave the lab - it looks like its control crystal only works up here. Maybe if I can reattune the enchantment...?
translations.chinese: 卡塞莫叔叔今天从姆津查莱夫特回来了。这趟旅行收获不小。他甚至给我带回了一样东西--一只没被护卫完全砸坏的蜘蛛。他想让我把它修好。这是我人生第一个大项目！ [pagebreak] 蜘蛛百夫长研究 第一周 我用博物馆里的零件重新组装了蜘蛛。所有关节都可以活动，但还不是自己在动。叔叔说蜘蛛需要一个有正确“谐波信号”的“控制水晶”。护卫已经去找了。 [pagebreak] 蜘蛛百夫长研究 第二周 昨天的事发生后，我召集了一批人去拿水晶。确实有效！使用法杖的时候，法杖会产生某种指示信号，蜘蛛就会径直走过去。更好的是，它现在不会胡乱攻击看到的人！ [pagebreak] 蜘蛛百夫长研究 第三周 显然它还是会攻击，只是没被发现。今早的实验中，新来的护卫被吓了一跳，拔出了剑，没等任何人反应过来，他就死了。它真的能探测到恶意吗？ [pagebreak] 蜘蛛百夫长研究 第四周 进一步的测试证实，蜘蛛似乎以某种方式检测到自己控制者的意图。上周，它还试图保护我免受威胁。 这周，我呵斥了一个打断我最新试验的护卫，而它也冲了过去猛击他。有意思！ [pagebreak] 蜘蛛百夫长研究 第五周 没有人欣赏我的工作。卡塞莫叔叔忙于伐莫的研究，没时间再帮我研究蜘蛛了。 护卫们都很害怕。 我一直告诉他们只要我控制住它就不会有什么问题，但已经发生了太多的事故。他们就是不相信我。 [pagebreak] 我想给领主展示，但我好像无法让蜘蛛离开实验室——它的控制水晶似乎只在这里起作用。 但也许我能重新调整这个魔法……？

translations.english: Nephew - I apologize that I cannot see you personally before you leave. The trip from Sadrith Mora is treacherous this season, or I would have visited upon hearing the news. The Nords have a fine college at Winterhold, and I am sure you will excel. You may know that I, too, attended there. I was quite the conjuration adept in my own day. I am sending you my notes on something called the 'Atronach Forge', a bit of a project of mine while at Winterhold. Mention nothing to the faculty, but ask your fellow pupils about a place called the Midden. You will find the Forge there. I fear a number of my notes are missing, scattered and lost in my travels around Skyrim. Perhaps you may stumble across these in your own adventures. [pagebreak] The Atronach Forge offers few clues as to who built it, and even fewer as to how to unlock its full potential. Only through blind experimentation, and a few singed eyebrows, have I been able to understand its function. The Forge is mostly a large dais, almost crude of make, but emblazoned with the traditional Daedric O rune. An offering box is attached, as well as a prominent lever. The Dais also features a large setting which seems set to receive some large, spherical object. I have had no luck determining what this missing object may be, however, or what effect it may have on the efficacy of the Forge. The Forge is activated by placing certain items into the offering box, and then pulling the lever. The Forge consumes the items and conjures something upon the dais. The conjuration can be predicted reliably if the appropriate items are left in the box - but many combinations either have no effect or catastrophic reactions. Once I conjured a wild goat! Well, most of the goat, at least. Experimenting wildly with the Forge is dangerous. I've recorded such recipes as I have discovered on the following pages. The simplest, yet perhaps most hazardous stable recipe is that for a summoned atronach. The conjured brutes will attack the first thing they see, however! Be ready for battle if you have reason to use these recipes. [pagebreak] Flame Atronach: Fire Salts + Ruby Frost Atronach: Frost Salts + Sapphire Storm Atronach: Void Salts + Amethyst
translations.chinese: 侄儿： 我很抱歉不能在你离开前亲自见你。这种季节从萨德瑞斯·莫拉启程实在危险，若非如此，我一听闻这些消息便会来访。诺德人在冬堡有个相当不错的学院，而且我确信你将在此脱颖而出。你应该知道我以前也在那里上过学。想当年我可是一位技艺娴熟的召唤系专家。我把关于“侍灵熔炉”的笔记寄给你，这是我尚在冬堡时的一个项目。 莫要跟师长提及，去问同学，找他们了解“秽道”的所在。熔炉就在那里。恐怕我在天际旅行时遗失了不少笔记。兴许你会在你自己的冒险生涯中与它们不期而遇。 几乎没有线索表明侍灵熔炉是何人建造，更没有开发它全部潜力的蛛丝马迹。最后通过反复盲目实验，还烧掉了不少眉毛，我才了解了它的具体功能。 [pagebreak] 熔炉的主体是个巨大的台子，打造工艺几近粗制滥造，但装饰有传统的迪德拉O 符文。附属有个贡品箱，以及一柄突出的杠杆。台子上还有另外的巨大装置，似乎是为放置某些大型球状物件而设。然而，我尚不能确定遗失的物件为何，还有它对熔炉的功效有何影响。 熔炉是通过将某些物品置入贡品箱内，然后拉动杠杆来激活。熔炉会消耗这些物品，并在台子上召唤某些事物。只要物品组合合适，召唤就是可以预测的，但更多的组合要么是徒劳无功，要么就是灾难性的反应。我曾有一次召唤出一头野山羊！好吧，至少是山羊的绝大部分躯体。 疯狂地对熔炉进行实验很危险。下面几页是我发现的配方。 最为轻而易举的，但也许是最为危险的稳定配方是召唤侍灵。然而，受召唤的野蛮生物看见什么就会攻击什么！如果你有理由使用这些配方，那就要做好战斗准备了。 [pagebreak] 火焰侍灵： 火盐 + 红宝石 冰霜侍灵： 霜盐 + 蓝宝石 风暴侍灵： 虚无盐 + 紫水晶

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim EDID: dunMiddenAtronachForgeBook Translations: - BOOK:DESC | EN:

I fear a number of my notes are missing, scattered and lost in my travels around Skyrim. Perhaps you may stumble across these in your own adventures. [pagebreak] The Atronach Forge offers few clues as to who built it, and even fewer as to how to unlock its full potential. The Forge is mostly a large dais, almost crude of make, but emblazoned with the traditional Daedric O rune. An offering box is attached, as well as a prominent lever. The Dais also features a large setting which seems set to receive some large, spherical object. The Forge is activated by placing certain items into the offering box, and then pulling the lever. The Forge consumes the items and conjures something upon the dais. The conjuration can be predicted reliably if the appropriate items are left in the box - but many combinations either have no effect or catastrophic reactions. Once I conjured a wild goat! Well, most of the goat, at least. Experimenting wildly with the Forge is dangerous. I've recorded such recipes as I have discovered on the following pages. The simplest, yet perhaps most hazardous stable recipe is that for a summoned atronach. The conjured brutes will attack the first thing they see, however! Be ready for battle if you have reason to use these recipes. [pagebreak] Flame Atronach: Fire Salts + Ruby Frost Atronach: Frost Salts + Sapphire Storm Atronach: Void Salts + Amethyst | ZH:

translations.english: The missing students were found in the Midden this morning. Dead, as expected. None of us bothered keeping a detect life charm for the search at this point. The bodies were found together, each suffering the same deformities; peeled and bubbling skin on the arms and face. Conjurer's burn, as it's commonly referred to around the College. There's little doubt they were attempting a summoning ritual well beyond their capabilities. The relic nearby put any doubt in this theory to rest. I admit that I've never seen one like it - a large, segmented sculpture of a gauntlet, the Daedric sigil 'O' emblazoned upon the palm. Attempts to move it were in vain. I must show it to Archmage Sedoth during his upcoming visit. Perhaps he will know more. While we couldn't move the relic, I was able to pry four "rings" from it. I'm sure there's a connection between them and the ritual the students were attempting. I'll store these in the Arcanaeum until we can consult with a conjuration master to learn more.
translations.chinese: 失踪的学生已在秽道发现。如预期一样，全部死亡。我们没有再费心去保持探测生命的魔法了。 这些尸体毫无疑问是一同被发现的，每个都有同样的畸形现象：手臂和脸部的皮肤被剥去或起泡。这是“召唤师灼烧”，学院里很常见，他们毫无疑问是尝试了一种超过自己能力范围的召唤仪式。 附近的遗物打消了所有疑虑。我从未见过如此巨大、分段的护手雕塑，手掌心上还雕刻着迪德拉文的“O” 字纹样。试图移动无果。我必须在大法师瑟多斯到来的时候展示给他。也许他会知道更多。 虽然我们无法移动该遗物，但我从里面撬出四个“指环”。相信它们与学徒们尝试的仪式有一定联系。 我要把这些东西放在秘藏馆，直到我们从召唤大师处了解更多。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim EDID: dunMiddenInvestigationBook Translations: - BOOK:DESC | EN:

The missing students were found in the Midden this morning. Dead, as expected. None of us bothered keeping a detect life charm for the search at this point. The bodies were found together, each suffering the same deformities; peeled and bubbling skin on the arms and face. Conjurer's burn, as it's commonly referred to around the College. There's little doubt they were attempting a summoning ritual well beyond their capabilities. The relic nearby put any doubt in this theory to rest. I admit that I've never seen one like it - a large, segmented sculpture of a gauntlet, the Daedric sigil 'O' emblazoned upon the palm. Attempts to move it were in vain. I must show it to Archmage Sedoth during his upcoming visit. Perhaps he will know more. While we couldn't move the relic, I was able to pry four "rings" from it. I'm sure there's a connection between them and the ritual the students were attempting. I'll store these in the Arcanaeum until we can consult with a conjuration master to learn more. | ZH:

失踪的学生已在秽道发现。如预期一样，全部死亡。我们没有再费心去保持探测生命的魔法了。 这些尸体毫无疑问是一同被发现的，每个都有同样的畸形现象：手臂和脸部的皮肤被剥去或起泡。这是“召唤师灼烧”，学院里很常见，他们毫无疑问是尝试了一种超过自己能力范围的召唤仪式。 附近的遗物打消了所有疑虑。我从未见过如此巨大、分段的护手雕塑，手掌心上还雕刻着迪德拉文的“O” 字纹样。试图移动无果。我必须在大法师瑟多斯到来的时候展示给他。也许他会知道更多。 虽然我们无法移动该遗物，但我从里面撬出四个“指环”。相信它们与学徒们尝试的仪式有一定联系。 我要把这些东西放在秘藏馆，直到我们从召唤大师处了解更多。 | SID: 0094EF - BOOK:FULL | EN: Midden Incident Report | ZH: 秽道事故报告 | SID: 00F7CD

translations.english: I'm sick of repeating myself. Hand this to the man replacing you between shifts, and ensure he reads it before you leave the post. I am not to be disturbed. Permit no one in my chamber, ever. Certain people may come looking for me. I want those people dead. You'll be back to raiding pig farms tomorrow if you foul this up.
translations.chinese: 我厌倦了重复自己的话。把这封信交给换班的人，并确保他在你离开岗位前看完。 我不想被打扰。不准任何人进入我的房间。谁进来谁死。 如果你把这事搞砸了，明天你就得回去抢劫养猪场了。
姆津查莱夫特守卫的字条

agentText:

EDID: dunMzinchaleftGuardNote
Translations:
- BOOK:DESC | EN: I'm sick of repeating myself. Hand this to the man replacing you between shifts, and ensure he reads it before you leave the post. I am not to be disturbed. Permit no one in my chamber, ever. Certain people may come looking for me. I want those people dead. You'll be back to raiding pig farms tomorrow if you foul this up. | ZH: 我厌倦了重复自己的话。把这封信交给换班的人，并确保他在你离开岗位前看完。 我不想被打扰。不准任何人进入我的房间。谁进来谁死。 如果你把这事搞砸了，明天你就得回去抢劫养猪场了。 | SID: 0092A6
- BOOK:FULL | EN: Mzinchaleft Guard's Note | ZH: 姆津查莱夫特守卫的字条 | SID: 00F297

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont' size='20'> Lucky to have talked my way out of the gates at Bruma. Time to leave Cyrodiil. Skyrim, not so bad if you don't mind the smell of mammoth. Maybe I can forget the research, forget the contract. The air is clean here. Caravan brought questions with it. They'll catch up sooner or later. Money won't do any good. Need some dwarven junk to pacify them, but how? Markarth was promising, but locked up tight and I'm no thief. Need to find another way. Highwaymen killed the driver and tried to rob me. Vivec must have been with me, managed to talk them into working for me to excavate dwarven ruins they are camped in. Safer than the cities anyway. These bandits are thick, but nobody's going to find me down here. Actually found some artifacts, must try to find a buyer. Maybe I'll actually make enough coin to pay these fools what I've promised for their labor. Can't go to Markarth again. Staying in the ruins for now. What's my next move?
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont' size='20'> 万幸我在布鲁玛找到了出路。是时候离开希罗帝尔了。 如果不介意猛犸的味道，天际也不算很糟。也许我可以忘掉研究、忘掉合同。这里的空气很干净。 商队带来了问题。他们迟早会赶上来。给钱是没用了。得用些矮人垃圾来安抚他们，但怎么办呢？ 马卡斯倒是很有前途，但被管得严严实实，我又不是个贼。得另找地方了。 强盗杀了车夫还想抢劫我。维威克一定与我同在，我说服了他们为我工作，去挖掘他们驻扎的矮人遗迹。反正比城里安全点。 这些强盗很厉害，但没人能找到我。我居然发现了一些文物，一定要努力找买家。也许我能赚到足够的钱来给这些傻瓜付报酬。 不能再去马卡斯了。暂时待在遗迹里。我下一步该怎么做？

translations.english: You want this in writing? Fine. The deal is you lot help me get the artifacts out of this ruin and I deliver them to my buyer. No artifacts, no coin. I will pay by the piece, so get as many as you can. Good luck getting anything for these without me. -Maluril Ferano
translations.chinese: 你要我写下来？好吧。 交易就是你们帮我把文物从遗迹里弄出来，我把它们交给我的买主。没有文物，就没有金币。我按件付钱。你能拿多少拿多少。 祝你们能在没有我帮忙的情况下，有些收获。 --玛鲁利尔·费拉诺

translations.english:
How foolish to move through this place so quickly. It's taken me only a few hours to crack the back gate. Maybe I'll donate a cup or two, but Krag says he knows some private buyers who will pay handsomely for a working trinket. There has to be one in here.

* * * * *


The side doors are all locked, but this chest should have one or two things of value. When I get out I'm going to buy myself a castle.
translations.chinese:
这么快就穿过这地方太蠢了。我只花了几小时就打开了后门。也许我会捐出一点，但卡拉格说认识些私人买家，会花大价钱买些还有用的小饰品。这里肯定有。

* * * * *


侧门都锁着，但这个箱子里肯定有一两件值钱东西。等我出去，我要买座城堡。

translations.english:
After making our way down the mine and through the spiders we've finally made it down to Nchaund-Zel proper. They've built this city into the very cave walls that house it. Amazing. Nchuand-Zel hums with life, but its guardians lay dormant, hopefully we can learn more as we go deeper.

* * * * *

This area seems to be where two of the city's families lived. We've spent some time studying this tree outside the dwellings but cannot figure out what its significance is. Stromm will be remaining behind with one of the students to further study this area in greater depth. I look forward to reading his notes on the subject.

* * * * *

Today we entered the city's armory. The Falmer have yet to break into the best of the dwarven goods thanks to the sturdy dwemer locks. Erj said he would be able to get into the vaults and would send word when he's in. The spiders gave us much trouble but who could have foreseen they've been the only thing keeping Markarth safe?

* * * * *

After exiting the Armory we made camp, but the Falmer have been watching us and finally tired of our intrusion. They came while we slept and slaughtered what guards were left. Meridia forgive me for using my students as a distraction to get away, but I have to bring this place back to life.

* * * * *

too many . . . couldn't hit switch . . .
translations.chinese:
我们沿着矿场往下走，穿过蜘蛛群抵达了尼楚安德-泽尔。他们把城市建在了洞穴里。太神奇了。尼楚安德-泽尔充满了生命，但守护者却在休眠，希望随着我们深入研究，能了解到更多。

* * * * *

这片区域似乎是城市里两户人家居住的地方。我们在民居外研究过这棵树，但不知道它的意义。斯特罗姆和其中一名学生留在后面，进一步研究该区域。期待能阅读他关于该课题的笔记。

* * * * *

今天我们进入了城市的军械库。多亏矮人坚固的锁，伐莫还没能撬开他们最好的物品。厄基说他能进入保险库，进去后给我们发信号。蜘蛛给我们带来了很多麻烦，但谁能想到它们是唯一能保护马卡斯安全的东西？

* * * * *

离开军械库，我们扎营了，但伐莫一直在关注我们，终于厌倦了我们的入侵。他们趁我们睡觉的时候来屠杀了剩下的护卫。美瑞蒂亚，请原谅我用自己的学生来帮我分散注意力，但我必须让这个地方活起来。

* * * * *

太多了…… 没法按下开关了……

translations.english:
I knew if we dug deep enough we'd eventually hit some fresh ruins. Markarth, a city built upon a city. From early pieces recovered we've determined the name of the city is Nchuand-Zel, but past that we have very little info. We've been given an escort though and tomorrow we will delve into the city proper.

* * * * *


It's only been a day and I already miss my desk and chair. I thought it would be a little more fun to explore, but so far it's just been fighting spiders and getting to view an occasional rubble pile. Hopefully we get to the main ruin soon so we can set up a camp and I can start cataloguing some of the items I've been able to find.

* * * * *


We found the Armory earlier and Erj has stayed behind to find a way into the main vault. If anyone can open the locks it's him. We've kept going and settled up here for the night since the guards say it will be easy to defend. I've put up a few runes just in case.
translations.chinese:
我知道，如果我们挖得够深，最后会挖到新的遗迹。马卡斯是城中之城。从早期发现的碎片里，我们确定了这座城市的名字叫尼楚安德-泽尔，但过去的信息太少了。我们已经被护送到了现场，明天我们将深入城区。

* * * * *


才过了一天，我就开始怀念我的桌椅了。我本以为探索会更有趣，但到现在，我只是在和蜘蛛战斗，偶尔看看碎石头。希望我们能赶紧到主遗迹区，这样我们就能搭个帐篷，我也能开始整理我找到的东西了。

* * * * *


我们之前找到了军械库，厄基留下来想办法进到主保险库去。如果有人能把锁打开，那就是他了。我们继续前进，选择在这儿过夜，因为护卫说这里容易防守。我写了一些符文以防万一。

translations.english: I've successfully activated the city's remaining automatons. They should be more then capable of driving the remaining Falmer out. I should see if anyone is looking for the expedition.
translations.chinese: 我成功激活了城里余下的机械。它们应该有能力赶走剩下的伐莫。我应该去看看有没有人在打听探险队的下落。

translations.english: I've informed Calcelmo about the journal and received some gold for my efforts.
translations.chinese: 我已经把日记的事告诉了卡塞莫并得到了一笔金币。

translations.english: I've discovered Stromm's corpse. Maybe if I venture deeper into Nchuand-Zel I can find the rest of the group. Hopefully they're still alive.
translations.chinese: 我发现了斯特罗姆的尸体。但愿我深入尼楚安德-泽尔时能发现小组其他的人还活着。

translations.english: I should try and find the researchers Alethius mentioned in his note.
translations.chinese: 我应该去找阿列休斯在笔记中提到的研究员们。

translations.english: It appears the entire party was wiped out trying to reactivate the city's defenses. I need to find the lever Staubs mentioned and activate it.
translations.chinese: 看来整支队伍在试图重新激活城市防御系统时覆没了。我得找到斯陶宾提到的杠杆然后激活它。

translations.english: Find someone who knows about the expedition.
translations.chinese: 找到知晓此次探险的人。
重启尼楚安德-泽尔的自动防御系统

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: dunNchuandZelQstCalcimoRewardTopic

- DIAL:FULL | EN: I've found this expedition journal. | ZH: 我找到了这本探险日记。 | SID: 005CA2

translations.english:
I've decided to remain behind with one of our guards and further document the living area we've stumbled across. I write this to the best of my ability, but due to the sudden disappearance of the Dwemer it is almost impossible to say for certain what anything is. The Tree By the Nine I cannot determine the purpose of this tree. It appears to be from the area around Whiterun, but why and how it got here is beyond me. I think it may be a gift from the surface world, but based on the lavish surroundings it could also be a display of power. I'll check the living areas nearby for any additional clues. Living Areas Upon further investigation of the area, it looks like this structure houses two clans or families. I can think of no other reason for this particular layout. Perhaps this group oversaw this particular portion of the city? I'll have to compare notes from the other areas as we uncover more of the city - hopefully some of those will contain more in depth clues. It appears a smaller wing collapsed on itself and maybe when the expedition returns we can dig out an entrance. Falmer have begun to creep back into this area of the ruins. It's a good thing I am not alone here.
We've managed to block off some of the areas we suspect the Falmer were coming in through, but they're still getting to us somehow. Together we are able to hold them back, but how long until Staubin and the rest return?
translations.chinese:
我决定和一名护卫留下来进一步记录我们偶然发现的这个生活区。我会尽我所能写完这篇文章，但由于锻莫的突然消失，几乎没法下定论了。 [pagebreak] 树 我无法确定该树的用途。似乎是来自白漫附近的地区，但我不明白它是怎么被移栽到这里的。我认为这可能是地表世界的礼物，但基于周围奢华的环境，也可能是一种权力的象征。我去附近的生活区找找有没有其他线索。 [pagebreak] 生活区 根据对该区域的进一步调查，这座建筑似乎住着两个氏族或家庭。我想不出这样特殊布局的其他原因了。也许是这个组织在监督城市的这个特殊区域？随着我们对这座城市探索的越发深入，我必须与其他区域的人交换意见，希望其中能包含更多深入的线索。好像有个小侧翼倒塌了，也许等探险队回来，我们可以挖出一个入口。 [pagebreak] 伐莫已经悄悄摸回这片区域了。还好我不是一个人在这里。
我们已经成功封锁了一些我们怀疑的伐莫可以通过的区域，但他们还是会以某种方式接近我们。我们齐心协力就能阻止他们，但斯陶宾他们什么时候能回来？

translations.english: <font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="20">For once, we actually caught a lucky break. With Pale Pass closed and Helgen wiped off the map, the last few soldiers up at Fort Neugrad were easy pickings. We should be able to loot the place and be out well before the Jarl has time to respond. [pagebreak] Finally found the keys to the Fort's old library. I sent Brandish down to scour the place. Wouldn't normally waste the time, but I've heard rumor the wizards up north pay good coin for anything magical. At this point, we'll take what we can get. There's a ton of rotten food in the old cellars, but not much else worth taking.
translations.chinese: <font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="20">这次我们真走运了。随着苍白隘口关闭和海尔根消失，纽格拉德堡最后几个士兵很容易就被我们吞了。我们应该能在领主反应过来之前洗劫一番然后离开。 [pagebreak] 终于找到堡垒旧图书馆的钥匙了。我派布兰迪什去搜查了一下。我一般不愿意浪费时间，但听说北方的巫师会愿意出高价购买魔法物品。希望我们能找到吧。老地窖里还有成吨腐烂的食物，但其他东西没多少值得带走的。

translations.english: <font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="18"> Legate, As ordered, I have assumed command of Fort Neugrad. Morale is low, and the ongoing chaos in Helgen has left our supply lines dangerously vulnerable. Pale Pass is all but closed due to avalanches in the mountains. We need more support, or our garrison will not withstand another attack. </font>
translations.chinese: <font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="18"> 副官： 我奉命接管纽格拉德堡。如今士气低落，海尔根的持续混乱让补给线岌岌可危。由于山上发生雪崩，苍白隘口也几近关闭。我们需要更多支援，否则守军禁不起下一次攻击。 </font>

translations.english: <font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="18"> Lord Ulfric, Though we drove the Emperor's dogs from Fort Neugrad, they still nip at our heels. The chaos in Helgen is bad enough, but now I have word of a new Imperial force assembling in the south, ready to advance on our position as Pale Pass is clear. Send reinforcements, or all our gains will be for naught. </font>
translations.chinese: <font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="18"> 乌弗瑞克大人： 虽然我们把皇帝的走狗赶出了纽格拉德堡，但它们还是穷追不舍。海尔根的混乱已经够糟了，但我现在得到消息，说一支新的帝国军正在南部集结，打算确保苍白隘口之后向我们推进。请速派援军，否则我们的战果就要白费了。 </font>

translations.english: <font face="$HandwrittenFont" Size="20"> Damn those Giants. Just one Mammoth would feed us for a month, but they herd them around like prized cattle, never taking an eye off them. We've hunted this area dry. Unless we get a kill soon, we'll have to find somewhere else to camp.
translations.chinese: <font face="$HandwrittenFont" Size="20"> 那些巨人真该死。一头猛犸够我们吃上一个月，但他们把猛犸当成珍贵的牲口赶在周围，眼睛都不带挪开的。我们已经把周围能打的猎物打光了。除非能再找到猎物，不然就得换别的地方扎营了。

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> We got the right cart this time. The note has been sent and we'll see how they respond. In the meantime, we'll keep breaking down this stuff - you keep selling off the wood to keep our front. If we can get a good price for the mold, we should be set for a while. Oh and we left some wine for you in a bucket behind the shelf. Consider it a bonus. -- Rigel Strong-Arm </font>
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> 这次我们找对车了。消息已经发出去了，看看他们如何反应。 我们同时还要继续拆这些东西，你继续去卖木头维持我们的前哨。如果我们把模具卖个好价钱，咱们就可以歇一阵子了。 对了，我们在架子后面的桶里给你留了些酒。就当是额外奖励吧。 --“壮臂”利赫尔 </font>

Consider it a bonus. -- Rigel Strong-Arm </font> | ZH: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> 这次我们找对车了。消息已经发出去了，看看他们如何反应。 我们同时还要继续拆这些东西，你继续去卖木头维持我们的前哨。如果我们把模具卖个好价钱，咱们就可以歇一阵子了。 对了，我们在架子后面的桶里给你留了些酒。就当是额外奖励吧。 --“壮臂”利赫尔 </font> | SID: 00AC27

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> Now look here Da, You're the one who always told me that swinging an ax was the only thing I've ever been good at so what do you expect me to do? The Stormcloaks pay dung for soldiering and I'm not going to fight for those mud-sucking Imperials. I've got a good racket picking the traders off the road here and I couldn't give a damn what you think about it. Your 'little sabrecat' has a tidy operation out here and I'm not going to give it up just cause you're afraid of getting caught. Oh and quit trying to send back the money. These louts just try to steal it and I have to beat their skull until they learn any different. -- Rigel Strong-Arm </font>
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> 看看这里，爸。 你一直告诉我，挥舞斧头是我唯一擅长的事。所以你想让我干什么？给风暴斗篷当兵根本挣不着钱，那些烂泥帝国人也不配我为之而战。在这里抢路人的勾当很不错，我根本不在乎你怎么想。 你家的“小剑齿虎”在这里混得不错，我不会因为你害怕被抓就放弃。 哦，别再想把钱寄回来了。这群笨蛋想偷这些钱，我得揍他们的脑袋，让他们学会听话。 --“壮臂”利赫尔 </font>

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: dunPinewatchNote03
Translations:
- BOOK:DESC | EN: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> Now look here Da, You're the one who always told me that swinging an ax was the only thing I've ever been good at so what do you expect me to do? The Stormcloaks pay dung for soldiering and I'm not going to fight for those mud-sucking Imperials. I've got a good racket picking the traders off the road here and I couldn't give a damn what you think about it. Your 'little sabrecat' has a tidy operation out here and I'm not going to give it up just cause you're afraid of getting caught. Oh and quit trying to send back the money. These louts just try to steal it and I have to beat their skull until they learn any different. -- Rigel Strong-Arm </font> | ZH: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> 看看这里，爸。 你一直告诉我，挥舞斧头是我唯一擅长的事。所以你想让我干什么？给风暴斗篷当兵根本挣不着钱，那些烂泥帝国人也不配我为之而战。在这里抢路人的勾当很不错，我根本不在乎你怎么想。 你家的“小剑齿虎”在这里混得不错，我不会因为你害怕被抓就放弃。 哦，别再想把钱寄回来了。这群笨蛋想偷这些钱，我得揍他们的脑袋，让他们学会听话。 --“壮臂”利赫尔 </font> | SID: 008EA7
- BOOK:FULL | EN: Rigel's Letter | ZH: 利赫尔的信 | SID: 001D47

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> By the Nine, Rigel! Think about what you're doing! I don't care if you kill off a couple skooma-headed Khajiit traders - they have no business being in Skyrim anyway. But think about what you're doing! There are armies fighting out there and they're bound to use the roads from time to time. They're going to start noticing if traders go missing and for that matter, why don't you just join up with one of the armies? I gave up on marrying you off to some merchant's son since ya got the face of a skeever, but that doesn't mean you couldn't put a helmet on and find some work for a soldier. Use those meaty arms of yours, girl! And quit sending me money! I don't need your charity! -- Da </font>
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> 九圣灵在上，利赫尔啊！好好想想自己在干什么！ 我不在乎你是不是杀了卖斯库玛的卡吉特商人，反正他们与天际无关。但琢磨琢磨你在干什么！ 军队在那边打仗，他们肯定会时不时走那些路。如果有商人失踪，他们就会注意到你。你为什么不去参军呢？ 自从你长了张恶鼠脸，我就放弃把你嫁给某个商人的儿子了，但这不意味着你不能戴上头盔，去参个军什么的。好好运用你那对肥胳膊吧，姑娘！ 别再给我寄钱了！我用不着你施舍！ --你爸 </font>

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: dunPinewatchNote04
Translations:

There are armies fighting out there and they're bound to use the roads from time to time. They're going to start noticing if traders go missing and for that matter, why don't you just join up with one of the armies? I gave up on marrying you off to some merchant's son since ya got the face of a skeever, but that doesn't mean you couldn't put a helmet on and find some work for a soldier. Use those meaty arms of yours, girl! And quit sending me money! I don't need your charity! -- Da </font> | ZH: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> 九圣灵在上，利赫尔啊！好好想想自己在干什么！ 我不在乎你是不是杀了卖斯库玛的卡吉特商人，反正他们与天际无关。但琢磨琢磨你在干什么！ 军队在那边打仗，他们肯定会时不时走那些路。如果有商人失踪，他们就会注意到你。你为什么不去参军呢？ 自从你长了张恶鼠脸，我就放弃把你嫁给某个商人的儿子了，但这不意味着你不能戴上头盔，去参个军什么的。好好运用你那对肥胳膊吧，姑娘！ 别再给我寄钱了！我用不着你施舍！ --你爸 </font> | SID: 008D82
- BOOK:FULL | EN: Father's Missive | ZH: 父亲的信 | SID: 00BD4F

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> Come on, it won't be that bad. Rigel may be paranoid, but she's as dumb as a mammoth! Body hair like one too! I'm just saying if we can get into that treasure room we would be set! We could just take the money and head north to catch a ship. I know a guy, whose cousin knows a guy, that could get us set up with some pirates in Hammerfell. And in the meantime we could live high on that money for months! </font>
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> 得了吧，没那么糟。利赫尔是有点偏执，但她笨得像个猛犸似的！体毛也很像！ 我是说，只要咱们进了藏宝库，我们就发了！到时候拿着钱到北边搭船。我认识个人，他表哥认识个人，能帮我们在落锤找海盗入伙。在此期间，咱们可以拿着这笔钱快活好几个月！ </font>

translations.english: <font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="20"> There's something unsettling about these caravan attacks. I expected bandits, but the remains we saw were literally torn apart, rent limb from limb. Yet no mere animal could coordinate an attack on a full-sized merchant train. And wolves don't take prisoners. We've found a trail leading up into the hills. We'll make camp here for the night, then set out at dawn. Whoever- whatever- murdered those people, we'll make sure it never happens again.
translations.chinese: <font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="20"> 商队被袭击让人有些不安。我以为是强盗，但我们看到的尸体都被撕成碎片肢解了。然而，仅仅动物是无法协调攻击一队正常规模的商队的。而且狼也不会抓人。 我们发现了一条通往山上的小路。我们在这里扎营过夜，然后等清晨再出发。不管是谁或者什么东西杀了那些人，我们都必须保证这种事不再发生。

- BOOK:FULL | EN: Adventurer's Journal | ZH: 冒险家的日记 | SID: 00F1D7

translations.english: <font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="20"> I begged my husband not to go, but he just wouldn't listen. He said if he delayed the shipment even another week, the Legion would find someone else to take it south. Let them keep their blasted money. The road to Whiterun is dangerous these days, everyone knows it. So many caravans have been attacked, so many travellers vanished into thin air. Some say it's only bandits, but there are rumors of worse. Goblins. Ghosts. Witches. Twenty years we've been married now, and I can't bear the thought of losing him. I'm not letting him go alone, not this time. We live or die together. Mara preserve us.
translations.chinese: <font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="20"> 我求我丈夫不要去，但他就是不听。他说如果再推迟一周交货，军团就会另找别人带货南下了。 让他们留着那该死的钱吧。人人都知道去白漫的路很危险。那么多商队都遭到袭击了，还有很多旅行者消失得无影无踪。有人说是强盗干的，但还有更可怕的传言。哥布林、鬼魂、女巫…… 我们已经结婚二十年了，我无法忍受失去他的想法。我不能让他一个人去，这次不会。是死是活我们都要在一起。愿玛拉保佑我们。

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont' size='17'> I have heard talk about the Dragons, but didn't believe it until now. One flew by last week and ever since we have seen him fly back and forth from a nearby mountain peak. My wife thinks we should move away, go somewhere else. I told her that would be nonsense. As long as we don't bother it, it won't bother us. Still, I thought it would be best if we report it to the local authorities. The creature's lair is just south the hill behind our shack near Bear's Cave Mill.
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont' size='17'> 我听说了龙的传闻，但直到现在才相信。上周有一只飞了过去，从那以后我们就一直看到它在附近的一座山上飞来飞去。我老婆觉得应该搬到别的地方去。我说她在胡说八道。只要我们不打扰它，它就不会打扰我们。不过最好还是向当地官面上报告吧。怪物的巢穴就在小山的南边，在我们的小屋后面，靠近熊窟木材厂。

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><div align="left"> Coming to this area was a brilliant decision! The local flora seem to have many useful properties that I've been able to utilize into new potions! Outside, the rich soil has allowed the cuttings I've collected to grow into fine and bountiful plants! This afternoon, I think I will journey out for more mushrooms, as my current supply is beginning to dwindle. On a personal note, I have moved my alchemy work outside the shack. I find the midday air is a boon to my health, as well as inspirational to my work.
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><div align="left"> 来这里真是太明智了！这里的植物似乎有很多有用的特性，我可以用它们来制作新药！外面肥沃的土壤把我收集来的枝条长成了美丽而丰富的植物！今天下午我想去多买点蘑菇，我现在的供应有点不够了。 我个人来说，我把炼金工作台搬出了小屋。我发现中午的空气对我的健康有好处，对我工作也有启发。

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='20'> 4 E 20 This tower once served as a meeting place where those brave souls who achieved safe passage to Skyrim would find loved ones, and leave notice for others who could not be found. Let it stand in honor of those who had the strength and spirit to accept Skyrim's Offer "untithed to any thane or hold, and self-governed, with free worship, with no compensation to Skyrim or the Empire except as writ in the Armistice of old wheresoever those might still apply, and henceforth let no Man or Mer say that the Sons and Daughters of Kyne are without mercy or honor." We, the Jarls of Skyrim, hereby decree this site as monument to the struggle of those who fled their native home of Morrowind in the time following the Red Year. </font>
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='20'> 4E20年 此塔楼曾是那些抵达天际的勇敢灵魂聚会的场所，在这里他们可以找到自己的亲人，并为那些无法找到的人留下提示。 让它为那些有力量和精神接受天际提议者的荣誉而耸立吧，“不向任何武卫或领地缴纳赋税，自信自治，不在旧有《停战协议》这一仍适用的条约以外对天际或帝国做出任何赔偿，从今往后，任何人与莫都不能说凯娜的子女是没有怜悯与荣誉的。” 我等天际领主在此宣告，此地为红色之年后从晨风背井离乡的奋斗者的纪念碑。 </font>

We, the Jarls of Skyrim, hereby decree this site as monument to the struggle of those who fled their native home of Morrowind in the time following the Red Year. </font> | ZH: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='20'> 4E20年 此塔楼曾是那些抵达天际的勇敢灵魂聚会的场所，在这里他们可以找到自己的亲人，并为那些无法找到的人留下提示。 让它为那些有力量和精神接受天际提议者的荣誉而耸立吧，“不向任何武卫或领地缴纳赋税，自信自治，不在旧有《停战协议》这一仍适用的条约以外对天际或帝国做出任何赔偿，从今往后，任何人与莫都不能说凯娜的子女是没有怜悯与荣誉的。” 我等天际领主在此宣告，此地为红色之年后从晨风背井离乡的奋斗者的纪念碑。 </font> | SID: 0091A1

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> Tracked down a small den of bears today. Their pelts are in fine condition and should fetch a good price. Going to set up camp for the night and kill the beasts in the morning. Hopefully we can get by on the few arrows we have left, or I may have to fall back on my blade
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> 今天找到了一窝熊。毛皮保存得不错，应该能卖个好价钱。晚上要扎营了，明早再去打猎。希望能靠剩下的几支箭撑过去，否则我就得掏剑肉搏了。

- BOOK:DESC | EN: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> Tracked down a small den of bears today. Their pelts are in fine condition and should fetch a good price. Going to set up camp for the night and kill the beasts in the morning. Hopefully we can get by on the few arrows we have left, or I may have to fall back on my blade | ZH: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'> 今天找到了一窝熊。毛皮保存得不错，应该能卖个好价钱。晚上要扎营了，明早再去打猎。希望能靠剩下的几支箭撑过去，否则我就得掏剑肉搏了。 | SID: 0079D3
- BOOK:FULL | EN: Hunter's Journal | ZH: 猎人的日记 | SID: 001A5E

translations.english: <font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="15"> Agent Sanyon, In response to your report dated 22nd Morning Star 401, your request for an expeditionary force is hereby denied. Sanyon, this is the seventh report you have filed this month, and not one of your leads - not one!- has turned up so much as a shred of evidence that a Talos shrine exists in the Lake Ilinalta region. No prisoners. No documents. Nothing! Our forces are stretched thin enough as it is, and I have better missions - better agents - to assign them to. If you feel so sure of your informant, investigate this yourself. Come back with proof. Or not at all. By my hand and seal, Elenwen </font>
translations.chinese: <font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="15"> 山永特使： 根据你401年晨星月22日的报告，驳回你远探队的申请。 山永，这是你本月呈交的第七份报告，但一条线索都没有，没有任何线索能表明在伊琳娜塔湖区有塔洛斯祭坛！没有犯人。没有文件。什么都没有！ 我们的战线已经拉得够长了，而且我有更好的任务与特使有待安排。如果你对自己的情报有足够把握的话，就自己去调查。带着证据回来。否则就别管我不讲情面了。 爱琳温 亲笔 </font>

translations.english: 8th of Frostfall Oh, Talvur! Dear, sweet Talvur! I can't stop thinking about him! Since that first moment I laid eyes on him in the marketplace, my heart was lost. But Father would never allow me to marry a commoner, much less a poor Dunmer miner. Mara, what to do? [pagebreak] 11th of Sun's Dawn Another letter from Talvur, the third this week. He says he can't live without me, that he'd rather die than lose me to another. Oh, I feel the same way! I can't abide this any longer. Father is sure to find out eventually - the maids are all aflutter over my "secret love." Something will slip. Talvur and I must be long gone by then, or Father will have all the Reach up in arms against him. [pagebreak] 22nd of First Seed I've convinced Father to take me on his next trip out east. When we reach the inn at Old Hroldan, I'll slip out at night and meet Talvur in the hills above Soljund's. Talvur says he's been saving his wages for the last few months, stowing them away in the old stump up there. With that, we should be able to buy passage to Riften, and our freedom. Oh, love, I can't wait another hour!
translations.chinese: 霜落月8日 哦，塔尔弗！亲爱的塔尔弗！我无法停止思念！自从我在集市上第一眼看到他，我就沦陷了。但父亲绝不会让我嫁给平民，更遑论可怜的丹莫矿工。玛拉啊，我该怎么办？ [pagebreak] 日晓月11日 塔尔弗寄来新的信了，这是这周的第三封。他说没有我就活不下去，他宁死也不愿把我让给别人。哦，我也同感！ 我再也受不了了。父亲最终一定会发现，女仆们都在为我的“暗恋”激动不已。早晚会被戳破的。那时候塔尔弗和我早就远走高飞了，否则父亲会动用全瑞驰的力量来对付他。 [pagebreak] 初种月22日 我说服父亲下次去东边时把我带上。等我们到古霍尔丹的旅店，我就在夜里溜出去到索云德山和塔尔弗会合。 塔尔弗说过去几个月他一直在攒钱，把钱藏在那边的老树桩里。有了它，我们就能到裂谷城去，还能拥有自由。亲爱的，我等不了了！

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><div align="left"> Father wouldn't like it if he caught me swimming out here again. But I just can't help myself. Forsworn sightings be damned, I love the way the cool water feels on my skin. Besides, with the war raging, those savages won't dare leave the safety of their tents. So I think I'll head down to my special spot one more time.
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><div align="left"> 如果父亲又看到我在这里游泳，他会生气的。但我就是管不住自己。弃誓者真该死。我喜欢泡在清凉的池水里的感觉。再说，战争越打越激烈，那些野蛮人根本不敢离开自己的帐篷。所以我还想再去一次对我来说最特别的那个地方。

translations.english: <font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="20">I can't believe I let Skeggr talk me into this again. If he just wanted to get drunk and swap stories, we could have done that in front of a nice fire back in Windhelm, instead of on this godforsaken mud flat. [pagebreak] "But the fish are biting, Advald!" "The catch will more than pay for the trip!". Yeah, right- if we don't get iced in first. His boat's already taking on water. I guess we'll try again tomorrow. If we don't catch something then, I'm heading home, with or without him. </font>
translations.chinese: <font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="20">真不敢相信我又被斯克格说服了。他如果只想喝几杯，讲讲故事，我们大可以在风舵城的炉火前聊，而不是在这该死的泥滩上。 [pagebreak] “鱼上钩了，阿德瓦尔德！“”这回赚的可比旅费多多了！”是啊，前提是我们没被冻死的话。他的船已经开始进水了。我想明天再试一次，要是还没抓到什么，那不管他走不走，我都要回家了。 </font>

translations.english: Ahkari, You can take those prices and eat them. We've found our own source of Skooma now- the real stuff, not that watered-down thirdhand trash you've been selling. And don't even think of ratting us out- one word to the guard, and I'll make sure they know what that 'seer' of yours is really up to.
translations.chinese: 阿卡利： 你就抱着那个价格把那些东西自己吃了吧。我们找到斯库玛的货源了，真正的好货源，不是你那些掺水的三手垃圾。别想出卖我们——只要向卫兵说句话，我就能让他们知道你那个“先知”的真面目。

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><div align="left"> Well, after all my years living in these woods, it looks like the Rockjoint will finally be the end of me. I guess that's fine. All my friends are long dead. The only one left is poor Meeko. He was always a loyal companion, and I know he'll be able to take care of himself. I hope someday I'll see him again.
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><div align="left"> 我在树林住了这么多年，看来关节石化终于快要了我的命了。也好。我所有朋友都死了很久了。现在就剩下可怜的米科了。他一直是我忠诚的好伙伴，而且我也知道他能照顾好自己。希望有一天还能再见到他。

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> This war isn't as good for business as I'd thought it would be. Sure the pay is good, but the runs are harder with all the extra soldiers on the roads and finding jobs that are worth the risk is difficult. Like our current job. Guy hires us to move a bunch of crates with few questions asked. So we get the goods here and I take a look in the boxes, just to know what I've gotten myself into. And what do I find? Bodies! That bastard has me moving bodies! Well I stripped them of their jewels and gold, so the joke's on him. </font>
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> 这场战争对商业的影响没我想象的大。赚头还不错，但路上的士兵更多了，要找到值得冒险的工作就更难了。 就像我们现在的工作。那家伙雇佣我们搬箱子还不让问问题。所以我们把货送到这里，我来看看箱子里有什么，就是想看看我在搬什么。我发现了什么？ 尸体！那混蛋让我搬尸体！我把他们珠宝和金币都拿走了，就当跟他开玩笑了。 </font>

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: dunPOIVolcanicVampireJournal
Translations:
- BOOK:DESC | EN: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> This war isn't as good for business as I'd thought it would be. Sure the pay is good, but the runs are harder with all the extra soldiers on the roads and finding jobs that are worth the risk is difficult. Like our current job. Guy hires us to move a bunch of crates with few questions asked. So we get the goods here and I take a look in the boxes, just to know what I've gotten myself into. And what do I find? Bodies! That bastard has me moving bodies! Well I stripped them of their jewels and gold, so the joke's on him. </font> | ZH: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> 这场战争对商业的影响没我想象的大。赚头还不错，但路上的士兵更多了，要找到值得冒险的工作就更难了。 就像我们现在的工作。那家伙雇佣我们搬箱子还不让问问题。所以我们把货送到这里，我来看看箱子里有什么，就是想看看我在搬什么。我发现了什么？ 尸体！那混蛋让我搬尸体！我把他们珠宝和金币都拿走了，就当跟他开玩笑了。 </font> | SID: 00774C
- BOOK:FULL | EN: Smuggler's Journal | ZH: 走私者的日记 | SID: 00394D

translations.english: Two hero-hearts Two hidden keys One fallen Priest Who lies beneath Hail Sarek, Hail Torsten Raise them in your songs Who tricked mad-king Otar and rescued Ragnvald for all Otar! once our chieftain Glorious in battle Fair in judgment Those days ended in pain Dark voices whispered into Otar's mind nobility shouted down Once good now craven Priest Fair folk of Ragnvald Good Nords and True Broken by his will our city eaten alive Send Sarek! Send Torsten! Sure spirits swords that don't fail Otar was bent back but never destroyed Bound instead, contained Two Heroes, Two Keys
translations.chinese: 两位英雄之心， 两枚隐藏之钥， 一位堕落的祭司安葬此处。 赞美萨瑞克，赞美托斯滕， 用尔等歌声颂扬吧， 他们是欺骗疯王奥塔， 拯救拉根沃德之人。 我们曾经的领袖奥塔啊！ 作战英勇， 赋均讼平， 那往昔已在痛苦中结束。 黑暗的低语， 侵袭了奥塔的思维， 高贵的声音亦被击垮， 曾经的贤师变成了今日的懦夫。 拉根沃德的大好族人， 真挚善良的诺德， 被他的意志摧毁， 我们的城市被他生吞活剥。 出发吧萨瑞克！ 出发吧托斯滕！ 坚定的精神， 不败的利剑。 奥塔屈服， 却未被消灭， 而是被封印在内， 两位英雄，两把钥匙。

translations.english: 4th of Evening Star, 4E 200 It never ceases to amaze me how many fall for my simple trap. I may have to consider tweaking it a bit though. Many of them, in recent months, have been dying the second they hit the cage floor. Putting a foot or two of water in didn't help either. In fact, it may actually be making things worse. The last one to fall in broke both his arms and legs! He proceeded to float there and eventually drown. If it weren't for the water I would have had a great time twisting his mind until I decided to end him. 8th of Evening Star, 4E 200 Captured another one...finally. It's definitely true that whatever these Orcs gain in size and strength they lose in mental capacity. I'm amazed they can even speak. He kept saying that when he gets out he'll break me in half like a twig...persuasive isn't he? Anyway, I told him that if he holds his head under the water for as long as this candle wick lasts I'd let him go free. Stupid thing drowned within minutes! I never tire of this. 13th of Evening Star, 4E 200 I haven't captured a soul for days, and the last victim died on impact. Of course I was still able to reclaim his soul, but without the thrill of killing, or any kind of torture, the process lacks that special something. The reclaimed souls I've summoned make decent targets, but taking a mortal's life is so much more...sweet.
translations.chinese: 4E200年，夜星月4日 我总是惊讶于这简单的陷阱是怎么抓到这么多人。不过我可能要稍微调整一下。近来几个月许多人一碰到笼子底部就被摔死了，灌进去一两尺的水也无济于事。事实上水可能让事变得更糟了。上一个掉进去的摔断了胳膊腿！结果就那么漂在那里淹死了。要是没有水，我就能很开心地扭曲他的思维，直到我决定了结了他。 4E200年，夜星月8日 终于又抓到一个。毫无疑问，这些兽人的体型和力量与心智是成反比的。他们居然会说话。他一直在喊，说等他出来，就会把我像树枝一样劈成两半……挺有说服力啊？总之，我告诉他，如果他把头扎水里，坚持到蜡烛烧完，我就放他自由。几分钟就淹死了！我从来都是乐此不疲。 4E200年，夜星月13日 好几天没抓到灵魂了。最后一个受害者是摔死的。当然，我还是能收回他的灵魂，但没有了杀戮的刺激和任何形式的折磨，这个过程就缺乏了那种特殊的东西。召唤被再生灵魂倒是不错的目标，但剥夺凡人的生命会更……甜蜜。

translations.english: Red Eagle's Rite Having bathed the blade in human blood, present it at Rebel's Cairn together with your sacrifice and intone: Lord Red Eagle, ancient one, first and foremost among Reachmen, heed the call of your people! Still we fight for freedom! Still our blades are dark with blood! Turn your gaze upon us, and grant us your blessing anew! I renew the ancient covenant: When at last our lands are free, we shall return, your sword of victory in hand. Then arise, O great one, from your honored tomb! Reclaim thy stolen throne! Rule over us, High Lord of the Reach, forevermore!
translations.chinese: 红鹰仪式 令此剑沐浴人血，以之连同你准备的祭品及以下咏唱一起献给叛乱石冢： 主君红鹰，我等先祖，第一且最负盛名的瑞驰人，请聆听您子民的呼唤！我们仍在为自由奋战！我们的剑刃仍然沾满鲜血！请将您的目光转向我们，重新赐下您的祝福！ 我将重申远古的誓约：等我们的大地重获自由，我们将手握您的胜利之剑归来。噢，伟大者，请您起身离开您荣耀的墓穴吧！光复您被盗去的宝座！请永远统领我们吧，瑞驰的至高主君！

Still we fight for freedom! Still our blades are dark with blood! Turn your gaze upon us, and grant us your blessing anew! I renew the ancient covenant: When at last our lands are free, we shall return, your sword of victory in hand. Then arise, O great one, from your honored tomb! Reclaim thy stolen throne! translations.english: 5th of First Seed, 4E 201 Idiots! Brodir and Herd were at each others' throats again today, and nearly came to blows. The whole camp is on edge. I've ordered an extra ration of mead, but unless this fighting stops, we'll tear outselves apart. [pagebreak] 11th of First Seed, 4E 201 Rumor is that Herd's gathering followers for a mutiny. Brodir's not stupid; he's probably doing the same, just for insurance. I'd kill them both myself, but the camp's split right down the middle. If I tried, there'd be a knife in my back within a week. I can't take this anymore. I've begun skimming a little gold from the take, bringing it down here when I can. If I can scrape enough together, I'll make a run for it, head downriver to Dragon Bridge. [pagebreak] 28th of First Seed, 4E 201 Brodir's getting suspicious-- I caught him poking around in the cove this afternoon. I don't think he found my stash, but it's not safe here. I took the boat out tonight and stowed it on the island to the south, by the old tree stump. Had a good haul this week. Another caravan or two and I can finally get out of here, and not a moment too soon.
translations.chinese: 4E201年 初种月5日 一群蠢货！布洛迪尔和赫德今天又吵起来了，差点动手。整个营地都很紧张。我已经多订了一份蜜酒，但除非他们停下争斗，不然我们会四分五裂。 [pagebreak] 4E201年 初种月11日 传言说赫德正在集结手下人打算造反了。布洛迪尔也不蠢，以防不测他也会着手准备的。我真想亲手结果了这俩货，但营地会分裂。如果我试了，不出一周就会有人背后捅我一刀。 我再也受不了了。我开始从收入里捞点小钱，一有机会就带出来。等我凑够钱，我就跑，顺流而下去龙桥。 [pagebreak] 4E201年 初种月28日 布洛迪尔开始起疑心了，我今天下午抓到他在海湾闲逛。我看他还没发现我藏的东西，但这里不安全了。今晚我就把船开出去，停到南边老树桩旁边的岛上。 这周收获不小。再来一两个车队，我就能离开这里了，而且是以最快速度。

Brodir's not stupid; he's probably doing the same, just for insurance. I'd kill them both myself, but the camp's split right down the middle. If I tried, there'd be a knife in my back within a week. I took the boat out tonight and stowed it on the island to the south, by the old tree stump. Had a good haul this week. Another caravan or two and I can finally get out of here, and not a moment too soon. | ZH: 4E201年 初种月5日 一群蠢货！布洛迪尔和赫德今天又吵起来了，差点动手。整个营地都很紧张。我已经多订了一份蜜酒，但除非他们停下争斗，不然我们会四分五裂。 [pagebreak] 4E201年 初种月11日 传言说赫德正在集结手下人打算造反了。布洛迪尔也不蠢，以防不测他也会着手准备的。我真想亲手结果了这俩货，但营地会分裂。如果我试了，不出一周就会有人背后捅我一刀。 我再也受不了了。我开始从收入里捞点小钱，一有机会就带出来。等我凑够钱，我就跑，顺流而下去龙桥。 [pagebreak] 4E201年 初种月28日 布洛迪尔开始起疑心了，我今天下午抓到他在海湾闲逛。我看他还没发现我藏的东西，但这里不安全了。今晚我就把船开出去，停到南边老树桩旁边的岛上。 这周收获不小。再来一两个车队，我就能离开这里了，而且是以最快速度。 | SID: 00EB9D - BOOK:FULL | EN: Bandit Leader's Journal | ZH: 强盗头目的日记 | SID: 008132

translations.english: The Matriarch grows weary of your hesitation. Our people control the entire eastern slope of the reach- all save Sungard. Take it, and the invaders will be cut off from all retreat. But we must move now, while its defenses are still weak. Summon the tribes. Do what you must. But if you do not act, she shall find someone who will.
translations.chinese: 女族长已经厌倦了你的犹豫。我们的人已经控制了除森加德以外的整个河东坡地。只要拿下森加德堡垒，侵略者的后路就被切断了。趁它的防守还很薄弱，我们必须行动起来。 召集各部落。去做你必须做的事。如果你不打算行动，她会找到愿意行动的人。

translations.english:
Shelly,
Your ship should have arrived weeks ago and I fear the worst has happened. I've set up camp on this rock as your ship should pass by here and hopefully one of these days we'll be together again. If you're reading this I'm probably out hunting or bringing in some supplies. I'll be waiting here until I see your face again.
Faithfully yours, Trius
translations.chinese:
雪莉：
你的船几周前就应该到了，看来最坏的情况还是发生了。我在你的船应该经过的这块岩石上扎营了，希望有一天我们还能在一起。如果你看到这封信，我可能已经出去打猎或者找补给了。我会在这里等着，直到再见到你。
你忠实的， 崔尤斯

translations.english:
The Lunar Forge
The Forge I've managed to get the forge itself up and running, but again, I find nothing special about its workings. These weapons were clearly forged here, yet the secret of their enchantment remains elusive. All I've been able to discern so far is some connection between the weapon's power and the appearance of the moons.





The Lunar Weapons The weapons themselves are crafted of what seems to be normal metal, but while the moons are high above they gain an additional ability. It seems that once the sun has gone down, the Lunar weapons take on a vampire-like ability, transferring a small amount of health from the victim to the user.
translations.chinese:
月之锻炉
锻炉 我已经设法修好了锻炉并让它运转起来，但我又发现它的运行方式没什么特别的。这堆武器很明显是在这地方打出来的，然而它们上面那种附魔的秘密还是那么难以捉摸。到现在我能搞清楚的，也就是这些兵器的力量肯定和双月月相有联系。 月之武器 那些武器本身似乎就是寻常金属锻出来的，但一等月亮出来，它们就获得了额外的能力。看起来太阳一落下去，那些月之武器就拥有了像吸血鬼一般的效果，能从受害者身上将少量的生命力给吸取到使用者身上。

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> ...another dream of Red Mountain erupting. People running as flaming rocks the size of cantons fell from the sky... [pagebreak] ...can still see my brother's outstretched arm, as he tried to reach the silt strider and walked right out into the boiling waters... ...not just Vvardenfell, all of Morrowind was hit by the rocks. There's no work and no food will grow under the ashes. We are going to try for Skyrim... </font>
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> ……又做了一个红山爆发的梦。人们四散奔逃，燃烧的硕大石头从天而降…… [pagebreak] ……我还能看到我兄弟伸出手臂，他试图赶上泥沙漫步者，却掉进了沸腾的水里…… ……不仅是瓦登费尔，整个晨风都被陨石击中。灰烬之下无法谋生。我们得去天际试试…… </font>

There's no work and no food will grow under the ashes. We are going to try for Skyrim... </font> | ZH: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> ……又做了一个红山爆发的梦。人们四散奔逃，燃烧的硕大石头从天而降…… [pagebreak] ……我还能看到我兄弟伸出手臂，他试图赶上泥沙漫步者，却掉进了沸腾的水里…… ……不仅是瓦登费尔，整个晨风都被陨石击中。灰烬之下无法谋生。我们得去天际试试…… </font> | SID: 010A47

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> ...map we traded a glass dagger to get is a fake. We can't find the pass marked over the mountains... ...should have tried for The Rift... [pagebreak] ...took shelter from the storm in the ruins... ...stepped on a pressure plate and trapped us inside... ...Gildryn said he's heard the dwarven roads that leads under the mountains... ...have to try... </font>
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> ……我们用玻璃匕首换来的是假地图。找不到标记在山上的隘口…… ……应该去裂痕领试试…… [pagebreak] ……在废墟中躲避风暴…… ……踩在一个压力板上，我们都被困在里面了…… ……吉尔德林说他听说矮人的路通往山下…… ……必须试试…… </font>

[pagebreak] ...took shelter from the storm in the ruins... ...stepped on a pressure plate and trapped us inside... ...Gildryn said he's heard the dwarven roads that leads under the mountains... ...have to try... </font> | ZH: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> ……我们用玻璃匕首换来的是假地图。找不到标记在山上的隘口…… ……应该去裂痕领试试…… [pagebreak] ……在废墟中躲避风暴…… ……踩在一个压力板上，我们都被困在里面了…… ……吉尔德林说他听说矮人的路通往山下…… ……必须试试…… </font> | SID: 010AFE

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> ...hearing things in the darkness, every sound seems amplified and it is hard to sleep over the sobbing... [pagebreak] ...Madras has started hallucinating from hunger. Says she saw a white elf peering out at us from the dark corners of the tunnel... [pagebreak] ...used to be a battlemage and tried to hold them off... [pagebreak] ...caused a cave in that let some escape be we were trapped with these things... ...now hold us prisoner... ...given up hope of escape... </font>
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> ……黑暗中听到各种声音，而且都在被放大，在哭泣中难以入睡…… [pagebreak] ……马德拉斯因为饥饿出现幻觉了。她说看见一个白色的精灵在隧道的黑暗角落里盯着我们…… [pagebreak] ……曾有个战斗法师试图阻止他们…… [pagebreak] ……造成了一个洞穴，一些人逃脱了，我们被困在了这里…… ……现在把我们关起来吧…… ……放弃了逃跑的希望…… </font>

[pagebreak] ...used to be a battlemage and tried to hold them off... [pagebreak] ...caused a cave in that let some escape be we were trapped with these things... ...now hold us prisoner... ...given up hope of escape... </font> | ZH: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> ……黑暗中听到各种声音，而且都在被放大，在哭泣中难以入睡…… [pagebreak] ……马德拉斯因为饥饿出现幻觉了。她说看见一个白色的精灵在隧道的黑暗角落里盯着我们…… [pagebreak] ……曾有个战斗法师试图阻止他们…… [pagebreak] ……造成了一个洞穴，一些人逃脱了，我们被困在了这里…… ……现在把我们关起来吧…… ……放弃了逃跑的希望…… </font> | SID: 0106C9

translations.english: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> After trailing the beasts for several days, I think we've finally found their lair. It seems like their den is further in this cave. There may be more of them than we first thought, but after seeing the strange columns and pipes, there may be some sort of ruin here. My Gran always said those places were full of treasures just waiting for the first person to find them. We've decided to make camp and try to clear out the animals and see if there is anything worth taking. </font>
translations.chinese: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> 在跟踪这些野兽好几天后，我们终于找到它们的巢穴了。巢穴似乎在洞穴深处。数量可能比我们最初想象的要多，但看这些奇怪的柱子和管道，这里可能有某种遗迹。 我奶奶总说那些地方到处都是宝藏，就等着第一个发现它们的人。我们决定扎营了，把这些动物清走，看看有没有值得带走的东西。 </font>

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: dunTolvaldsCaveNote04
Translations:
- BOOK:DESC | EN: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> After trailing the beasts for several days, I think we've finally found their lair. It seems like their den is further in this cave. There may be more of them than we first thought, but after seeing the strange columns and pipes, there may be some sort of ruin here. My Gran always said those places were full of treasures just waiting for the first person to find them. We've decided to make camp and try to clear out the animals and see if there is anything worth taking. </font> | ZH: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> 在跟踪这些野兽好几天后，我们终于找到它们的巢穴了。巢穴似乎在洞穴深处。数量可能比我们最初想象的要多，但看这些奇怪的柱子和管道，这里可能有某种遗迹。 我奶奶总说那些地方到处都是宝藏，就等着第一个发现它们的人。我们决定扎营了，把这些动物清走，看看有没有值得带走的东西。 </font> | SID: 010B6F
- BOOK:FULL | EN: Hunter's Journal | ZH: 猎人的日记 | SID: 010B2A

translations.english: Vader has asked me to collect three vessels in Valthume to defeat the Dragon Priest Hevnoraak. I brought the vessels to Valdar who told me the vessels contained the blood of Hevnoraak. I used the blood to weaken and awaken Hevnoraak, and defeated him. Valdar told me to take his iron mask and faded away.
translations.chinese: 沃达尔让我在瓦尔图梅收集三个容器来击败龙祭司赫诺拉克。我把容器带给沃达尔，他告诉我里面装着赫诺拉克的血。我用这些血削弱并唤醒了赫诺拉克，最终击败了他。沃达尔让我拿走了赫诺拉克的铁面具，然后消失了。

translations.english:
All four are bound to the same land as we. Some lay low, consumed in shadow, Others stand tall, stretching their necks to see. While none live in this sacred barrow, They all demand your attention if you are to proceed. [pagebreak]

The first fears all, The second fears none. The third eats what it can, Preferably number one. The fourth fears the second, But only when alone. All must be activated in order, If you wish to go home.
translations.chinese:
这四者与我们生活于同一片土地上。 有的匍匐于地，隐于暗处。 有的站于高处，伸长脖颈。 虽无其一居住于此神圣古墓。 但如果你要继续前进，它们就会要求你的注意。 [pagebreak]

第一个畏惧一切， 第二个无所畏惧。 第三个什么都吃， 最好是第一个。 第四个畏惧第二个， 可也仅限独处之时。 如果你想平安抵达， 就要激活这一切。

translations.english:
I was skeptical, but it's obvious now. The old hymns had truth to them! The relief wasn't far from the entrance, just as they said. I've no doubt now that it hides the entrance to Kvenel's tomb.
The two keys must be hidden somewhere nearby - ceremonial replicas of Okin and Eduj, favored weapons when Kvenel went into battle. I don't dare explore further without hiring bodyguards to accompany me, however. To think - The Tongue Chieftain Kvenel could be entombed behind just a few feet of stone! The ancestor we scarcely believed was real.
Twice damned for planning this foolish scouting trip. I should have hired those sellswords in the first place. Perhaps there's no need. This place is just a tomb, after all, and there are no obvious signs of habitation. It isn't as though the thousand-year dead will mind if I have a look around.
translations.chinese:
当时还很怀疑，但现在结果很明显了。古老的圣歌是真的！如它们所说的一样，凹槽的地方离入口不远。我现在确信这里藏着通往基伏奈尔坟墓的入口。
奥金和埃杜伊这两把仪式钥匙的复制品肯定就在某个地方。这两把钥匙是基伏奈尔上战场时最喜欢的武器。不过，如果不雇保镖的话，我是不敢进一步探索的。想想看，发声者酋长基伏奈尔就埋在几尺厚的石头后面！这可是我们几乎不相信曾经存在的祖先。
两次因为策划这愚蠢的探查之旅而被骂了。我一开始就该雇佣这些佣兵。不过也许必要。这地方就是个坟，而且也没有明显的居住迹象。死了几千年的人估计也不会介意我四处看看。
赫迪克的沃伦鲁德笔记

translations.english: <font face="$HandwrittenBold" size="17">Pickings have been good these past few weeks. Must be because of the war- lots of merchants and cowards looking for somewhere to curl up and hide from all the fighting. I've told the men to ease the burden on these poor souls by relieving them of all that gold they're carrying. [pagebreak] Guard patrols along the road are way up- we can barely set foot outside. Travellers must have complained to the Jarl. It looks like the guard isn't ready to move against us yet, but the pressure is getting to the men. I'm having Ra'jirr keep watch with Ulfr now- that should shut them up about our security. Damn that Balgruuf! [pagebreak] A mutiny! Among my men! I can hardly believe it. Thank the gods Ulfr heard of it in time- he may be blind, but he's not deaf. I killed Anjor myself. A couple of the others ran for it, but we hunted them down quick enough. Only Eisa and Ra'jirr got away. Good riddance. [pagebreak] There's rumor of a dragon attack on Helgen. A dragon! Hardly. More likely just a story made up by some idiot frightened out of his wits by the war. In any case, the guard seems to have pulled back to the city, so we've been able to run a few decent raids again. One of the merchants had some odd cargo... bunch of pelts and animals, including a wolf. I let the men roast the other animals, but the wolf I saved- be handy to have a guard dog like that, if we could just train him a little... </font>
translations.chinese: <font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="17">过去几周里油水不少。肯定是因为战争——很多商贩跟懦夫在寻找能躲过战争的地方。我已经告诉这些家伙把身上带着的金子都给去了，这样一来就能减掉这些可怜灵魂的累赘。 [pagebreak] 顺这条道巡逻的卫兵多起来了——我们现在差不多一步也迈不出门。旅人肯定跟领主告了状。看起来卫兵还没准备好跟我们干一仗，但小的们也开始有压力了。我现在要让拉'吉尔和伍尔夫一块盯紧点——这总该能让他们不再抱怨我们的安全问题了。天杀的巴尔古夫！ [pagebreak] 火并！发生在老子的人里！不敢相信。感谢诸神，伍尔夫及时听着了这事——他可能是瞎了，但他可没聋。我亲手宰了安乔尔。还有几个人想跑，但我们很快就逮着了他们。只有埃莎和拉'吉尔溜了。好快的腿。 [pagebreak] 有传言说一条龙袭击海尔根。龙！怎么可能呢。更像是些给战争吓坏了脑子的白痴瞎编的故事。 不管咋样，看起来卫兵是撤回城里头了，多亏这样我们总算能再干几票漂亮的了。其中一个商贩有些奇奇怪怪的货物……一堆毛皮和动物，里头还有一头狼。我让那家伙把其他动物都烤了，不过那头狼我留着了——如果我们能稍稍训练一下他的话，有条像这样子的警卫犬也挺方便…… </font>

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: dunWhiteRiverWatchHajvarrJournal
Translations:
- BOOK:DESC | EN: <font face="$HandwrittenBold" size="17">Pickings have been good these past few weeks. Must be because of the war- lots of merchants and cowards looking for somewhere to curl up and hide from all the fighting. I've told the men to ease the burden on these poor souls by relieving them of all that gold they're carrying. [pagebreak] Guard patrols along the road are way up- we can barely set foot outside. Travellers must have complained to the Jarl. It looks like the guard isn't ready to move against us yet, but the pressure is getting to the men. I'm having Ra'jirr keep watch with Ulfr now- that should shut them up about our security. Damn that Balgruuf! [pagebreak] A mutiny! Among my men! I can hardly believe it. Thank the gods Ulfr heard of it in time- he may be blind, but he's not deaf. I killed Anjor myself. A couple of the others ran for it, but we hunted them down quick enough. Only Eisa and Ra'jirr got away. Good riddance. [pagebreak] There's rumor of a dragon attack on Helgen. A dragon! Hardly. More likely just a story made up by some idiot frightened out of his wits by the war. In any case, the guard seems to have pulled back to the city, so we've been able to run a few decent raids again. One of the merchants had some odd cargo... bunch of pelts and animals, including a wolf. I let the men roast the other animals, but the wolf I saved- be handy to have a guard dog like that, if we could just train him a little... </font> | ZH: <font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="17">过去几周里油水不少。肯定是因为战争——很多商贩跟懦夫在寻找能躲过战争的地方。我已经告诉这些家伙把身上带着的金子都给去了，这样一来就能减掉这些可怜灵魂的累赘。 [pagebreak] 顺这条道巡逻的卫兵多起来了——我们现在差不多一步也迈不出门。旅人肯定跟领主告了状。看起来卫兵还没准备好跟我们干一仗，但小的们也开始有压力了。我现在要让拉'吉尔和伍尔夫一块盯紧点——这总该能让他们不再抱怨我们的安全问题了。天杀的巴尔古夫！ [pagebreak] 火并！发生在老子的人里！不敢相信。感谢诸神，伍尔夫及时听着了这事——他可能是瞎了，但他可没聋。我亲手宰了安乔尔。还有几个人想跑，但我们很快就逮着了他们。只有埃莎和拉'吉尔溜了。好快的腿。 [pagebreak] 有传言说一条龙袭击海尔根。龙！怎么可能呢。更像是些给战争吓坏了脑子的白痴瞎编的故事。 不管咋样，看起来卫兵是撤回城里头了，多亏这样我们总算能再干几票漂亮的了。其中一个商贩有些奇奇怪怪的货物……一堆毛皮和动物，里头还有一头狼。我让那家伙把其他动物都烤了，不过那头狼我留着了——如果我们能稍稍训练一下他的话，有条像这样子的警卫犬也挺方便…… </font> | SID: 00728C
- BOOK:FULL | EN: Hajvarr's Journal | ZH: 哈瓦尔的日记 | SID: 00FBB8

translations.english: Rodulf, Your little stunts try my patience. I know my uncle has issues, but he is our watchman and you will respect him. No more sneaking in and out. No more games with his ledger, or nails on his chair. One more 'joke' and you'll see how funny a day in the cage can be. Hajvarr
translations.chinese: 鲁道夫， 你丫的小把戏是在挑战老子的耐心。我知道我叔有毛病，但他是咱的警卫员，你该对他放尊重点。别再鬼鬼祟祟地摸进摸出。别再玩儿他的账本，别再在他凳子上放钉子。再开“玩笑”，就让你小子尝尝在笼子里头关一天有多快活。 哈瓦尔

translations.english: What a peculiar place the barrow turned out to be. I hadn't explored for very long before reaching this elaborate room and gate locking me from going further into the crypt. I confess it - I'm relieved! This place puts the fear of Oblivion into me. There are some carvings in this room. I'll attempt to transcribe them for the College so I have something to show for this effort. <HR> All was so in Atmora land of truth and our home Man in his throne, so should he be Whale in the sea, so should he be Eagle in Sun's Sky, so should he be Snake in the weed so should he be Sorrow! For the Sea-Ghosts took Yngol Prize Brother of Sail from Atmora's Fleet And none on land nor sky, nor sea would ever again be as should be <HR> Fascinating, these ancient Nords. I wonder what other secrets are hidden here? Surely there can't be harm in trying to go a little further, and there is a lever here which must open the gate beyond.
translations.chinese: 这座古墓真是个奇怪的地方。我探索了没多久就来到了这样一个精致的房间，大门挡住了我进一步深入墓穴的脚步。 但我得承认，我松了口气！这地方让湮灭的恐惧侵入了我的内心。这房间里有很多浮雕。我要试着把它们抄录下来送回学院，这样也算有东西能证明我的努力了。 <HR> 曾经的阿特莫拉 真理之土和我们的家 人端居于王座， 那是属于他的地方， 鲸遨游于海洋 那是属于他的地方， 鹰飞翔于炎日 那是属于他的地方， 蛇潜伏于草丛 那是属于他的地方， 哀哉！阿特莫拉舰队的英格尔， 扬帆起航的荣誉弟兄 竟被海鬼带走 不在陆地， 不在天空与海洋 只能永远， 待在属于他的地方 <HR> 这些古诺德人还真是迷人。真不知道这里究竟还藏着什么秘密？当然再往前走也不会有什么好处了，这里正好有根杠杆，一定能打开通往外面的门。

translations.english:
Arondil's Journal Day 1 It seems the cretins of Dawnstar are not quite a foolish as I had surmised. They found my experimentations, and needless to say, were not pleased with what they saw. No matter. My work can only flourish without the distractions of living amongst the unenlightened. I have found a cave off the north coast of Skyrim that will be more than sufficient for my continued studies. The ruins of Yngvild should hold the materials I need to learn more about reanimating and enslaving the dead.
On a personal note, I WILL miss the young maidens of Dawnstar. Such beauty was intoxication. I often found my thoughts wandering around them, imagining secret encounters between myself and one or two of the local girls...
translations.chinese:
阿荣迪尔的日记 第一天 看来晨星的白痴们也不像我想的那么蠢。他们发现了我的实验，不消说，他们对此很不满。无所谓。我的工作只有在不被无知者干扰的情况下才能蓬勃发展。 我在天际北部海岸找了个洞穴，用来继续研究绰绰有余了。鹰维尔德遗迹里应该有我需要的材料，来丰富我复活和奴役死者的知识。
不过我还是会想念晨星的年轻少女们。美得令人陶醉。我的思绪经常随她们游荡，想象着能和一两个当地女孩儿来一场神秘邂逅……

translations.english: Arondil's Journal Day 8 I have established a temporary work station in the cold caves, and have found multiple burial chambers within the snow and ice. While in the first chamber, I exhumed a few 'test subjects,' all female. I was stunned to find my mind wandering again to the women of Dawnstar as I examine my find. At first, I was slightly disturbed by my thoughts, but later I found myself reevaluating... Day 9 The first trials went splendidly. Each subject was reanimated in a state of total complacency, bending to my every task and whim. I have ordered a few of my new servants to guard the island, while the rest will act as my personal entourage, standing by me at all times. Standing watch over me while I sleep...
translations.chinese: 阿荣迪尔的日记 第八天 我在寒冷的洞穴里建了个临时工作点，又在冰雪下面发现了好几个墓穴。在第一间墓室里，我挖出了几个“测试对象”，还都是女性。我惊讶的发现，当我检视发现成果的时候，思绪又飞到了晨星的女人身上。一开始我还对此很困扰，但后来发现我得重新评估评估了…… 第九天 首轮实验很成功。每个对象都在一种十分完美的状态下重新活了过来，并服从我的所有指示和兴致。我已经命令几个新仆人守卫小岛，其他的则作为我的私人随从，随时陪在我身边。在我熟睡时守护我……

阿荣迪尔的日记 第八天 我在寒冷的洞穴里建了个临时工作点，又在冰雪下面发现了好几个墓穴。在第一间墓室里，我挖出了几个“测试对象”，还都是女性。我惊讶的发现，当我检视发现成果的时候，思绪又飞到了晨星的女人身上。一开始我还对此很困扰，但后来发现我得重新评估评估了…… 第九天 首轮实验很成功。每个对象都在一种十分完美的状态下重新活了过来，并服从我的所有指示和兴致。我已经命令几个新仆人守卫小岛，其他的则作为我的私人随从，随时陪在我身边。在我熟睡时守护我…… | SID: 0058E2 - BOOK:FULL | EN: Arondil's Journal, Part 2 | ZH: 阿荣迪尔的日记·卷2 | SID: 003950

translations.english: Arondil's Journal Day 21 An intriguing development. Tonight, my guards have brought me a trespasser they found near the cave. At first I was understandably upset. Not only was I disturbed during one of my few moments alone with my favorite servant, but I recognized the trespasser as a milk maid from Dawnstar. She remembered me, as well, and made bold claims that I had been lurking near her at all hours. What lies! True, I had taken notice of her on occasion, but she was nowhere near the most noticeable of maidens in town. Her continued accusations, coupled with my fear of more uninvited guests, led me to conclude that she could never return to Dawnstar. My servants were quick to carry out my sentencing. Her body is here next to me, as I write this. Funny. Her eyes are still so full of life. Perhaps I will try a new experiment tonight, using fresher materials.
translations.chinese: 阿荣迪尔的日记 第二十一天 有趣的进展。今晚我的守卫给我带来了一个在洞穴附近发现的入侵者。开始我理所当然的陷入沮丧。因为在我和我最喜欢的仆人独处的时间被打扰了，而且这个闯入者居然是晨星城的挤奶女工。她还记得我，居然大胆地声称我一直躲在她附近。什么鬼话！是，我是偶尔注意过她，但她可算不得城里最引人注目的姑娘。她不断地指责我，再加上我害怕引来更多不速之客，所以结论很明显了：她不能再回晨星城了。我的仆人很快就执行了我的判决。 当我写这篇日记的时候，她的尸体就在我身边。有意思。她的眼睛还充满活力。也许今晚我能用更新鲜的材料来做新实验了。

translations.english: Arondil's Journal Day 28 The new experiment has proven a success! The milk maid (who's name still escapes me) was revived as the others, bowing to my commands, with only one interesting development. She has reformed incorporeally, more phantasm than reanimated dead. As her glowing visage stood before me, I found my hand reaching out to touch her. As my fingers passed through her, I felt a sensation unlike any other, as if her essence were invigorating my very soul, connecting with me on a level no woman of flesh and blood could do. This discovery is life changing! Day 35 I have ordered my older servants to go out and find any more subjects that may have become lost. With the discovery of the inner sanctum deeper still within Yngvild, I should have sufficient room to store many new materials until I can transform them into willing slaves. I look back on my daydreams whilst living in Dawnstar and wonder if they were in fact portents of times to come...
translations.chinese: 阿荣迪尔的日记 第二十八天 新实验成功了！挤奶女工（我还是没记起她的名字）和其他人一样复活了，服从了我的命令，不过有个有趣的进展。她是以无实体状态复活的，与其说是死尸复活，不如说是幻影。当她容光焕发的面庞出现在我面前时，我忍不住伸手抚摸她。当我的手指穿过她的身体，感到了一种与众不同的感觉，仿佛是她的精华激励着我的灵魂，这种联系是任何有血肉的女人都无法做到的。这个发现改变了我的生活！ 第三十五天 我已经命令老仆人们出去寻找更多可能迷路的对象了。随着鹰维尔德更深处的密室被发现，我应该有足够的空间来存储更多新材料，直到我把她们都变成自愿的奴隶。回想起住在晨星的白日梦，真不知这是否预示着我的好时代到来了……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim EDID: dunYngvildJournal04 Translations: - BOOK:DESC | EN:
Arondil's Journal Day 28 The new experiment has proven a success! The milk maid (who's name still escapes me) was revived as the others, bowing to my commands, with only one interesting development. She has reformed incorporeally, more phantasm than reanimated dead. As her glowing visage stood before me, I found my hand reaching out to touch her. As my fingers passed through her, I felt a sensation unlike any other, as if her essence were invigorating my very soul, connecting with me on a level no woman of flesh and blood could do. This discovery is life changing! Day 35 I have ordered my older servants to go out and find any more subjects that may have become lost. With the discovery of the inner sanctum deeper still within Yngvild, I should have sufficient room to store many new materials until I can transform them into willing slaves. I look back on my daydreams whilst living in Dawnstar and wonder if they were in fact portents of times to come... | ZH:

translations.english: The dwarves of Tamriel disappeared millennia ago and are presumed extinct.
translations.chinese: 泰姆瑞尔的矮人已经消失几千年，被认为已经灭绝。

translations.english: Many Steam Animunculi remain active, making the exploration of dwarven ruins a dangerous prospect.

translations.english: The dwarves were actually a race of elves known as the Dwemer, which roughly translates to "deep elves."
translations.chinese: 矮人实际上是被称为“锻莫”的精灵种族，大致的含义就是“深精灵”。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: DwemerLoad04
Translations:
- LSCR:DESC | EN: The dwarves were actually a race of elves known as the Dwemer, which roughly translates to "deep elves." | ZH: 矮人实际上是被称为“锻莫”的精灵种族，大致的含义就是“深精灵”。 | SID: 001C4D

translations.english: "But our brethren, the Dwemer, scorned the Daedra, and mocked our foolish rituals, and preferred instead their gods of Reason and Logic." -- Vivec
translations.chinese: “但我们的锻莫同胞，蔑视迪德拉，嘲笑我们愚蠢的仪式，更加喜好他们的理性与逻辑之神。”——维威克

translations.english: Before you can enchant your weapon or armor, you'll need to learn an enchantment by sacrificing an enchanted item. Just use the arcane enchanter.
translations.chinese: 在你给武器和盔甲附魔前，需要先毁坏一个附魔道具来学习附魔效果。只需在奥术附魔台操作即可。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: Enchanting01
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Before you can enchant your weapon or armor, you'll need to learn an enchantment by sacrificing an enchanted item. Just use the arcane enchanter. | ZH: 在你给武器和盔甲附魔前，需要先毁坏一个附魔道具来学习附魔效果。只需在奥术附魔台操作即可。 | SID: 0055FB

translations.english: If you know an enchantment and have a filled soul gem, you can enchant armor and weapons. Just use the arcane enchanter.
translations.chinese: 如果你已经知道了一个附魔效果还有一颗充满灵魂的灵魂石，就可以用奥术附魔台对武器盔甲进行附魔了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: Enchanting02
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: If you know an enchantment and have a filled soul gem, you can enchant armor and weapons. Just use the arcane enchanter. | ZH: 如果你已经知道了一个附魔效果还有一颗充满灵魂的灵魂石，就可以用奥术附魔台对武器盔甲进行附魔了。 | SID: 009AFC

translations.english: Arcane Enchanters are worktables used by mages to enchant weapons and armor.
translations.chinese: 奥术附魔台是法师用来附魔武器和护甲的工作台。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: EnchantingBench
Translations:
- LSCR:DESC | EN: Arcane Enchanters are worktables used by mages to enchant weapons and armor. | ZH: 奥术附魔台是法师用来附魔武器和护甲的工作台。 | SID: 00F986

translations.english: An Arcane Enchanter can be used to learn new enchantments from weapons and armor, but any item experimented on is destroyed in the process.
translations.chinese: 奥术附魔台可以从武器和护甲上学习新的附魔，但学习过程会让试验品被摧毁。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: EnchantingLearn
Translations:
- LSCR:DESC | EN: An Arcane Enchanter can be used to learn new enchantments from weapons and armor, but any item experimented on is destroyed in the process. | ZH: 奥术附魔台可以从武器和护甲上学习新的附魔，但学习过程会让试验品被摧毁。 | SID: 00DA73
